rationale: Upper-push spine slot, full readiness, Home profile — barbell spine lifts substituted with dumbbell variants.

warmup.cue: Wake up the mid-back before pressing.
Forearms on the wall, slide up keeping contact throughout.

main.cue: Control the descent, drive in a slight arc.
Ribs down, press to lockout above the crown.
Shoulders down, lean slightly forward for chest emphasis.
Row tight to the ribs, long spine.

cooldown.cue: Low back pressed down, ribs tucked.
